meta.dataSource: Local fallback — use 'netlify dev' for live API data
meta.alertTicker: ⚠ LOCAL MODE — Start 'netlify dev' to fetch live data from ACLED, NewsAPI, Guardian, ReliefWeb, GDELT, and Alpha Vantage

globalStats.label: Live Conflict Data
globalStats.sub: Configure API keys in Netlify environment variables

timeline.title: Configure ACLED API for live conflict timeline
timeline.desc: Sign up at developer.acleddata.com for free conflict event data. Set ACLED_API_KEY and ACLED_EMAIL in your Netlify environment variables.

humanitarian.summary: Humanitarian data requires ACLED and ReliefWeb API connections. Configure environment variables to load live data.

economic.summary: Economic data requires Alpha Vantage API key. Sign up at alphavantage.co for free oil price and market data.

newsFeed.title: Configure NEWS_API_KEY and GUARDIAN_API_KEY for live news feed
GDELT articles load automatically (no key needed)
ReliefWeb humanitarian reports load automatically (no key needed)
